name: Pan Seared Red Snapper on Corn Chili with Grapefruit
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Heat oil in a heavy-bottomed oven-proof skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Season fish fillets with salt.
4. Sear fillets, skin-side up, until golden brown, about 4 minutes.
5. Turn fillets and roast in oven for about 4 minutes or until fish is opaque and just cooked through.
6. Spoon half a cup of Corn Chili into the center of a warmed dinner plate.
7. Place fish on top of the chili.
8. Mound Mexican Salad on top.
9. Serve immediately, garnished with lime wedges and cilantro.
Yield: 4 servings
